entity.description: It is grown and harvested in the Mekong Delta of Vietnam, one of the largest rice growing regions in the world. This high grade quality rice is a result of a perfect combination of an ideal environment and sophisticated technology. Milled, processed and stored in a facility committed to maintaining professional standards of cleanliness and hygiene, each pack of rice is recognised for its fine quality.
